title: Typed error codes and recovery hints
goal: Map PluginError to structured error response without parsing message strings

steps.action: Receive PluginError from any trait method
steps.assertion: err.code() returns the correct ErrorCode variant
returns a stable string token like "PLUGIN_REG_002"
returns a non-empty human-readable remediation string

steps.action: Each PluginError variant maps to a unique ErrorCode
steps.assertion: 10 variants, 10 distinct ErrorCode values, 10 distinct as_str() tokens
